radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Beta here, Alpha. Fire is extending through the upper windows and roofline, smoke pushing across the street corner. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Alpha here, Beta. Received. Visibility is dropping near the building corner and the hose line corridor. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Alpha here, Beta. I have visual on seven civilians near the sidewalk and tree line, holding at safe distance. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Beta here, Alpha. Received. Keep that group away from the parking area and clear of the hose line. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Beta here, Alpha. Three civilian vehicles remain exposed near the structure. Heat is increasing along the parking area. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Alpha here, beta. Received, smoke is drifting between the parked vehicles and the civilian group. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Beta here, alpha. Voice link is breaking near the smoke column. Short delay on my last transmission. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Alpha here, beta. Received, signal is stronger near the sidewalk, but degraded near the tree line and building corner. Finished.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Alpha here, beta. Civilian group remains stationary near the sidewalk. No visible injuries from my position. Finished.
